summary: First-finish smoke test of LOGIC LED Configurator. Backend endpoints, auth, RBAC, configurator, quote creation, and PDF download all working. Only failure: /api/ai/recommend returns 500 due to Emergent LLM budget exceeded.
passed: POST /api/configure returns full wall calc (cabinets 3x4=12, res 1000x667, LED area 6m^2, power 2.4kW) + 9 BOQ items, grand_total 1,601,850
POST /api/quotes creates quote LOGIC/Q/2026/0001; sets sales_person from JWT
RBAC: sales_executive sees only own quotes (0 vs admin's 1); POST /api/products by exec returns 403
Frontend login → dashboard renders 6 KPI cards + monthly-trend, quote-status, indoor/outdoor charts
Configurator: product-select shows 8 options, width/height inputs work, compute-btn triggers /configure, live-preview and boq-table render
Save Quote flow: quote-customer-select shows 4 options, save-quote-btn navigates to /quotes/{id} detail page with BOM table, PDF, Excel, and status-select buttons visible
PDF download from UI works (LOGIC_Q_2026_0001.pdf downloaded)
Logout button clears session and returns to /login

failed.issue: POST /api/ai/recommend returns 500. Root cause from backend logs: emergentintegrations.llm.chat.ChatError → litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0. Same failure will affect /api/ai/proposal-summary.
failed.evidence: curl POST /api/ai/recommend → HTTP 500 'Internal Server Error'; /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log shows Budget exceeded error at server.py:430 (chat.send_message).

action_items: The EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in /app/backend/.env has a 0 budget cap. Ask user to provide a funded EMERGENT_LLM_KEY (or top-up existing) so /api/ai/recommend and /api/ai/proposal-summary can call Claude Sonnet 4.5 successfully.
Note: Dashboard route in App.js is '/' (root), not '/dashboard'. If PRD expects /dashboard URL, add route alias; otherwise cosmetic only.
Optional: AI failures currently surface as HTTP 500 to UI; consider catching ChatError and returning friendly 503/402 with message.
